name: Skill Curator
description: Tracks skill usage telemetry, auto-archives stale skills, snapshots workspace skills before mutations, and runs periodic LLM review passes.

intervalHours.label: Interval Hours
intervalHours.help: How often (in hours) the curator runs its periodic pass.

minIdleHours.label: Min Idle Hours
minIdleHours.help: Agent must be idle this many hours before curator will run.

staleAfterDays.label: Stale After Days
staleAfterDays.help: Days since last use before a skill is marked stale.

archiveAfterDays.label: Archive After Days
archiveAfterDays.help: Days since last use before a stale skill is archived.
